one_line: A present-day researcher dedicated to deciphering the undeciphered Indus script using seals, data and debate.

appearance.age_look: early 30s, slim-to-average build, slightly bookish but energetic
appearance.face: Oval face with light-brown South Asian complexion, sharp attentive eyes with thin rectangular glasses, straight nose, faint dark circles from late-night work, a small beauty mark near the left cheekbone, default expression focused and curious with a gentle half-smile.
appearance.hair: Short, slightly wavy black hair parted to the right, neatly kept but with a few loose strands falling over the forehead; no headwear.
appearance.costume: Contemporary Indian academic style: a long-sleeved light-cream cotton kurta (mid-thigh length, straight cut, simple narrow band collar, fine vertical weave texture), paired with slightly tapered dark-navy chinos, a dark-brown woven leather belt, and soft brown lace-up leather shoes; on the left wrist a simple black thread bracelet and on the right wrist a slim silver analog watch; a muted maroon cotton stole folded and worn loosely around the neck like a light scarf, ends hanging evenly in front, adding a touch of scholarly formality.
appearance.signature: A slightly worn dark-brown canvas messenger bag worn cross-body, its flap half-open to reveal a foam-lined compartment holding a small tray of clay-coloured replica Indus seals with carved animal and sign motifs, plus a visible slim silver laptop edge and a rolled kraft-paper chart tube clipped to the side.

ref_desc: A focused early-30s Indus script scholar with light-brown skin, short wavy black hair, glasses, a cream cotton kurta, dark-navy chinos, brown leather shoes, maroon stole, and a brown canvas messenger bag full of replica Indus seals and a laptop.
sheet_prompt: Full-body anime-style model sheet of a modern Indus script scholar: early-30s South Asian with light-brown complexion, oval face, short slightly wavy black hair parted right, thin rectangular glasses and a focused, curious expression. Dress them in a long-sleeved light-cream cotton kurta with a narrow band collar and subtle vertical weave texture, mid-thigh length over dark-navy tapered chinos, with a dark-brown woven leather belt and soft brown lace-up leather shoes. Add a muted maroon cotton stole folded and worn loosely around the neck, simple black thread bracelet on the left wrist, and a slim silver analog watch on the right. Their signature item is a dark-brown canvas messenger bag worn cross-body, flap partly open to show a foam-lined tray of clay-coloured replica Indus seals with carved animal and sign motifs, the edge of a slim silver laptop, and a clipped kraft-paper chart tube at the bag’s side. Use a restrained palette of cream, dark navy, brown leather, maroon and black hair, and show front, side and back views plus a close-up of the face and the bag with seals for consistent redraws.
